PCY-DB-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-db-administration
PCY-DB-ADMINISTRATION.description: Example policy which allows the grp-db-admins group users to manage databases in all the environments and projects of the OE01.
statements: allow group grp-db-admins to use cloud-shell in tenancy
allow group grp-db-admins to read all-resources in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to use ons-family in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage alarms in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage metrics in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage orm-stacks in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage orm-jobs in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage orm-config-source-providers in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to read audit-events in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to read work-requests in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage data-safe-family in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage cloudevents-rules in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to use exadata-infrastructures in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to use vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to use dbServers in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage autonomous-vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage backup-destinations in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage backups in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage database-software-image in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage db-homes in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage databases in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage pluggable-databases in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage autonomous-databases in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage autonomous-backups in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage autonomous-vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-db-admins to manage autonomous-container-databases in compartment cmp-exacc

PCY-INFRA-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-lzp-infra-administration
PCY-INFRA-ADMINISTRATION.description: Example policy which allows the grp-infra-admins group users to manage the DB infra in all the environments and projects.
statements: allow group grp-infra-admins to use cloud-shell in tenancy

allow group grp-infra-admins to manage alarms in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage metrics in compartment cmp-exacc

allow group grp-infra-admins to manage orm-jobs in compartment cmp-exacc

allow group grp-infra-admins to read audit-events in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins to read work-requests in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage cloudevents-rules in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage exadata-infrastructures in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage dbServers in compartment cmp-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage dbnode-console-connection in compartment cmp-exacc

allow group grp-infra-admins to manage autonomous-vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc

PCY-LZP-PLATFORM-EXACC-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-lzp-platform-exacc-administration
PCY-LZP-PLATFORM-EXACC-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy which allows the groups grp-infra-admins and grp-db-admins to manage ExaCC resources in the Landing Zone Production Environment, shared ExaCC Platform compartment.
statements: allow group grp-infra-admins,grp-db-admins to use cloud-shell in tenancy
allow group grp-infra-admins,grp-db-admins to read all-resources in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins to use exadata-infrastructures in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage scheduling-policies in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage scheduling-windows in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage execution-windows in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra

allow group grp-db-admins to use exadata-infrastructures in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra where all{request.operation !='ValidateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='ActivateExadataInfrastructure',request.operation !='ChangeExadataInfrastructureCompartment',request.operation !='AddStorageCapacityExadataInfrastructure',request.operation !='CreateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='CreateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='UpdateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='DeleteVmClusterNetwork'}

allow group grp-infra-admins to manage vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra where all{request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_GI_SOFTWARE', request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_EXADATA_STORAGE'}
allow group grp-infra-admins to use dbServers in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage dbnode-console-connection in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage dbnode-console-history in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra

allow group grp-db-admins to use vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra where all{request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_SSH_KEY', request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_CPU',request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_MEMORY',request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_LOCAL_STORAGE',request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_FILE_SYSTEM'}
allow group grp-infra-admins,grp-db-admins to manage alarms in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins,grp-db-admins to manage metrics in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage orm-stacks in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-db-admins to manage orm-stacks in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-db
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage orm-jobs in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-db-admins to manage orm-jobs in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-db
allow group grp-infra-admins to manage orm-config-source-providers in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-db-admins to manage orm-config-source-providers in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-db
allow group grp-infra-admins,grp-db-admins to read audit-events in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins,grp-db-admins to read work-requests in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins,grp-db-admins to manage cloudevents-rules in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc
allow group grp-infra-admins,grp-db-admins to manage db-nodes in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-db-admins to manage backup-destinations in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-db
allow group grp-db-admins to manage backups in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-db-admins to manage database-software-image in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-db
allow group grp-db-admins to manage db-homes in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-db-admins to manage databases in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-db-admins to manage pluggable-databases in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-db-admins to manage autonomous-databases in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-db
allow group grp-db-admins to manage autonomous-backups in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-db
allow group grp-infra-admins,grp-db-admins to manage autonomous-vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra
allow group grp-db-admins to manage autonomous-container-databases in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-db
allow group grp-lzp-security-admins to use ons-family in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-security

allow group grp-lzp-prod-proj2-db-admins,grp-lzp-prod-proj2-infra-admins to use exadata-infrastructures in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc:cmp-lzp-platform-exacc-infra where all{request.operation !='CreateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='UpdateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='DeleteVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='ValidateVmClusterNetwork'}

allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage cloudevents-rules in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod

allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-adminsto use exadata-infrastructures in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod:cmp-lzp-pp-platform where all{target.compartment.name = /*-platform-exacc-infra/,request.operation !='ValidateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='ActivateExadataInfrastructure',request.operation !='ChangeExadataInfrastructureCompartment',request.operation !='AddStorageCapacityExadataInfrastructure',request.operation !='CreateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='CreateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='UpdateVmClusterNetwork',request.operation !='DeleteVmClusterNetwork'}

allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to use vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod where all{request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_SSH_KEY', request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_CPU',request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_MEMORY',request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_LOCAL_STORAGE',request.permission !='VM_CLUSTER_UPDATE_FILE_SYSTEM'}
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage autonomous-vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage backup-destinations in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage backups in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage database-software-image in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage db-homes in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage databases in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage pluggable-databases in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage autonomous-databases in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage autonomous-backups in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage autonomous-vmclusters in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod
allow group grp-lzp-preprod-db-admins to manage autonomous-container-databases in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-preprod

PCY-LZP-SECURITY-OPCTL-ADMINISTRATION.name: pcy-lzp-security-opctl-administration
PCY-LZP-SECURITY-OPCTL-ADMINISTRATION.description: Policy which allows grp-lzp-security-admins group users to manage Operator Access Control resources in the security compartment. Permissions extension.
statements: allow group grp-lzp-security-admins to manage operator-control-family in compartment cmp-exacc:cmp-lzp-security
